title: Cryptool moves from test server to mainnet this week
content_html:
Cryptool is moving from the test server to the mainnet this week.

Before the switch, the team is running a final round of testing on the Raise module. If you can help, sign up on the test platform and try a pool deposit using test tokens. Every test run helps confirm the system is ready for real traffic.

All participants, including everyone who tested in earlier rounds, will be rewarded. Thank you for being part of the launch.
author: Cryptool
